summary: Completed testing of new MCP (Model Context Protocol) tool functionality in Nagarik Sahayak app. Backend MCP integration 100% working - all search_schemes endpoints, MCP tools listing, and chat tool_calls array implementation functioning correctly. Frontend login flow has UI automation issues preventing complete MCP tool trace testing.

minor_issues.issue: Keyword detection for MCP tool triggering may be too strict - 'passport' queries don't trigger search_schemes tool but 'eligibility criteria passport' does
minor_issues.impact: Some legitimate queries may not get MCP tool assistance

ui_bugs.issue: OTP verification button becomes disabled or unclickable during automated testing, preventing progression to chat page
ui_bugs.note: Blocks automated testing of MCP tool trace UI - manual testing or login flow debugging needed

passed_tests: ✅ Backend MCP Tools List - /api/mcp/tools returns search_schemes tool with description
✅ Search Schemes - Kisan Query - Matches PM-KISAN, returns eligibility criteria
✅ Search Schemes - Health Query - Matches Ayushman Bharat health insurance
✅ Search Schemes - Sukanya Query - Matches Sukanya Samriddhi savings scheme
✅ Search Schemes - No Match Direct - Returns match_found=false with 'I don't know' message
✅ Chat API with Scheme Query - Returns tool_calls array with search_schemes tool trace
✅ Chat API with Greeting - Returns empty tool_calls array (no MCP tool triggered)
✅ All Backend APIs - 17/17 endpoints working (100% success rate)
✅ MCP Tool Data Structure - Proper documents_scanned, match_found, tool_input format
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend login flow UI state management issue during automated testing. OTP verification button becomes unclickable, preventing complete MCP tool trace UI testing. Backend MCP functionality is 100% working.

success_percentage.backend: 100% (17/17 tests passed, including 7 new MCP tests)
success_percentage.frontend: 0% (Login flow blocking MCP tool trace UI testing)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (Backend-frontend API integration verified via direct calls)
